creator: babak@farrokhi.net
text:
diff -ruN trafficserver.orig/Makefile trafficserver/Makefile
--- trafficserver.orig/Makefile	2011-12-10 19:00:09.000000000 +0330
+++ trafficserver/Makefile	2011-12-10 19:00:25.000000000 +0330
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
=20
 PORTNAME=3D	trafficserver
-PORTVERSION=3D	3.0.1
+PORTVERSION=3D	3.0.2
 CATEGORIES=3D	www
 MASTER_SITES=3D	APACHE/${PORTNAME}
=20
diff -ruN trafficserver.orig/distinfo trafficserver/distinfo
--- trafficserver.orig/distinfo	2011-12-10 19:00:09.000000000 +0330
+++ trafficserver/distinfo	2011-12-10 19:00:42.000000000 +0330
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (trafficserver-3.0.1.tar.bz2) =3D =
5aab91d4993a27bdb9650157ace4a41edc03ef9735cd25e7c917c8fffb23d0b2
-SIZE (trafficserver-3.0.1.tar.bz2) =3D 2417978
+SHA256 (trafficserver-3.0.2.tar.bz2) =3D =
1aa7fb67ea9e4d12a6decc98774375af4046d990a1d518752cc25232005a4bae
+SIZE (trafficserver-3.0.2.tar.bz2) =3D 2406437
